claim_boundary: GPU rental execution plan only. This is not crypto mining, not a blockchain mainnet, not a token launch, not a compression result, and not a hardware acceleration claim until the listed receipts are produced.

promotion_gates.compression_feedback: HOLD until byte-exact baseline matrix exists.
promotion_gates.hardware_witness: GPU visible plus CPU/GPU parity receipt, not just code execution.
promotion_gates.nuvmap_chain: HOLD until local fixture block replay and verifier exist.
